points: Developed backend microservices in Java with Spring Boot for an anti-fraud engine, including AI agents built with AWS Bedrock for real-time decision-making.
Implemented LLM integration (AWS Bedrock), enabling contextual transaction analysis and dynamic provider and tool selection.
Designed and implemented serverless pipelines (API Gateway + Lambda) integrated with microservices, supporting distributed, event-driven architecture.
Implemented an observability strategy with CloudWatch, S3, and Dynatrace, reducing incident diagnosis time.
Developed and evolved backend microservices in Java with Spring Boot in a distributed environment, ensuring high availability and scalability.
Designed and implemented an async pipeline with Kafka and Redis, reducing processing time from 3 hours to 40 seconds.
Developed device integrations via TCP/UDP sockets, reducing communication costs by 60%.
Modeled and optimized MySQL queries, improving performance of critical operations.
Mentored developers on best practices, technical reviews, and architecture decisions.
Developed and maintained REST APIs in Java with Spring Boot, contributing to the evolution of backend systems in a distributed environment.
Performed refactoring and performance optimizations on existing services, improving stability and efficiency.
Modeled and optimized MySQL queries using JPA/Hibernate, ensuring high performance on critical operations.
Developed device integrations via TCP/UDP sockets, working with real-time communication.
Worked in an agile environment (Scrum/Kanban), actively participating in the product development cycle.
Developed complete web systems for different clients, covering both the backend in Java with Spring Boot and the frontend with React/Next.js.
Designed and implemented REST APIs and microservices, including data modeling and MySQL database integration.
Deployed and configured applications in production environments, ensuring availability and stability.
Performed continuous maintenance including bug fixes, improvements, and feature evolution.

projects.title: Anti-Fraud AI Engine
projects.description: AI agent for real-time fraud detection with autonomous provider and tool selection based on transaction context

projects.title: Time Tracking System
projects.description: Employee clock-in/out platform with real-time dashboards, work hours analytics, overtime metrics, and automated reports. Includes a high-throughput report pipeline cutting processing from 3h to 40s

projects.title: Access Control System
projects.description: Real-time access control platform integrated with embedded devices via TCP/UDP sockets, managing entry/exit events and reducing communication costs by 60%

projects.title: License Management System
projects.description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for client registration, subscription plan management, and license control with tenant isolation and automated billing workflows

personalProjects.title: AURA.DOC
personalProjects.description: AI-powered clinic management platform with a humanized AI agent that handles patient care 24/7 via WhatsApp — automating scheduling, confirmations, and patient CRM. Reduced no-shows by 60% and response time by 85%

personalProjects.title: ByberHair
personalProjects.description: AI-powered barbershop management platform with automated scheduling, appointment confirmations, follow-up reminders, and client notifications — all handled by an AI agent via WhatsApp

personalProjects.title: IndieRek
personalProjects.description: Decision-based face matching API with biometric verification via a single POST request. Features custom thresholds, zero data retention, JWT auth, and sub-50ms latency

personalProjects.title: Gestão Integral
personalProjects.description: SaaS platform for service businesses to create professional quotes in minutes, track real costs, and visualize profit margins per project — eliminating spreadsheets and guesswork
